title: Age of Weapons - Reforged
description: A mod that adds tons of new weapons based on time ages!
body:
## 📖 Description This mod adds tons of new tools & weapons based on time ages! - I recommend using [Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli) for a ingame manual. ----- ### Features: - tons of new items, blocks, tools and weapons! - some items have very cool effects and features! - custom modelled blocks - config file - update checker - emissive textures support - [Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli) ingame manual - [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus) support - [Epic Fight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-mod) support - [JEED](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) support - small compatibility features with mods like [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight), [AllTheOres](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ato), [Immersive Engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering), [Energized Power](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/energized-power) and more... - a "Weapon box" for lucky blocks battles with weapons of the mod - a "Nexus" block for a team based tower defense game mode

## 📷 Presentation ![items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-10-22_00.01.56.png?raw=true) ![items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-10-22_00.02.09.png?raw=true) ![stone age items](https://i.imgur.com/9m8i9yu.png) ![antiquity items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-06-04_16.19.52.png?raw=true) ![middle ages items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-06-04_16.19.03.png?raw=true) ![middle ages items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-06-04_16.19.14.png?raw=true) ![edo period items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-10-22_00.02.19.png?raw=truee) ![piracy items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-06-04_16.18.42.png?raw=true) ![modern age items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-10-22_00.02.30.png?raw=true) ![future age items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-10-22_00.02.50.png?raw=true) ![legendary items](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-06-04_16.19.24.png?raw=true) ![blocks for some funny game modes](https://i.imgur.com/37kVrl6.png) ![weapon tooltips with perks](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-06-04_16.21.04.png?raw=true) ![smithing recipes](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX/General/blob/main/2023-10-22_00.05.05.png?raw=true) ![armor](https://i.imgur.com/kaMTexg.png)

## 🗃️ Dependencies ### Supported: - **Just Enough Items (JEI)** - Provides some additional info pages and shows all recipes - [CurseForge][cf_jei] | [Modrinth][mr_jei] - **Patchouli** - Provides an ingame manual for the mod - [CurseForge][cf_patchouli] | [Modrinth][mr_patchouli] - **MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures** - Enables the emissive textures of the mod - [CurseForge][cf_mcmeta] | [Modrinth][mr_mcmeta] - **Continuity** - Enables the emissive textures of the mod - [CurseForge][cf_continuity] | [Modrinth][mr_continuity] - **Better Combat** - Expands the combat mechanics - [CurseForge][cf_bettercombat] | [Modrinth][mr_bettercombat] - **Epic Fight** - Expands the combat mechanics - [CurseForge][cf_epicfight] | [Modrinth][mr_epicfight] - **Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED)** - Provides mob effect descriptions in JEI - [CurseForge][cf_jeed] | [Modrinth][mr_jeed] - **Immersive Engineering** - Weapon part recipes for the metal press - [CurseForge][cf_ie] | [Modrinth][mr_ie] - **Energized Power** - Weapon part recipes for the metal press - [CurseForge][cf_ep] | [Modrinth][mr_ep]

## 🎮 My other mods!
